name: linkedin-cli
description: Marketplace for the linkedin-cli plugin: drive personal LinkedIn workflows from the terminal — unofficial reads over your own session plus official OAuth publishing, documents, polls, and social actions.

plugins.name: linkedin-cli
plugins.description: The linkedin-cli skill that drives the tool: setup and auth, unofficial reads, official OAuth publishing for posts/media/documents/polls, comments, reactions, social metadata, and sns-json-v1 output.
